summary: Frontend-only testing of (1) Rabatt-bubbla discount badge on Hero and (2) StyleEditor + RichTextEditor on Hero/Text-block/CTA-banner sections. All 12 review scenarios PASSED end-to-end against public URL. No frontend bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Homepage.jsx is ~843 lines — approaching the 700-line refactor threshold. Consider splitting ConfigField's per-section branches into dedicated components (HeroConfig.jsx, TextBlockConfig.jsx, CtaBannerConfig.jsx, FeaturesConfig.jsx) for maintainability.

RichTextEditor uses the deprecated document.execCommand API. Chromium still supports it but Mozilla has deprecated it and future Chromium versions may drop support. Consider migrating to a library (Tiptap/Lexical/Slate) or manual selection+wrapping.

StyleControls.jsx PRESET_COLORS uses aria-label 'Välj färg <color>' but does NOT expose data-testid on each preset button. Adding e.g. data-testid={`${testidPrefix}-preset-${c}`} on presets would improve test targetability (currently required a JS aria-label workaround).

In Landing.jsx HeroSection, bubbleNode is rendered inside the image container when config.image_url is present (line 131), but only INSIDE the left text column when image_url is missing (line 124). This means the position dropdown ('top-right', 'top-left', ...) actually positions relative to the image container in the common case — behavior is correct here but may confuse admins who expect page-level positioning.
The RichTextEditor's onBlur re-emits innerHTML which can cause a state loop with contentEditable in edge cases; consider debouncing or gating onChange.

escapeAsHtml helper only splits on double-newlines and does not sanitize (only escapes <, >, &). Since content_html is later rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML on the public site, admin XSS is technically possible (admin already trusted, but note for future public-user editors).
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Existing hero.config.discount left in final state {enabled:true, title:'40% RABATT', subtitle:'Kod: TEST40', link:'/registrera-fagel', position:'top-left'} and hero.config.style.title_color='#B91C1C'. Existing text_block section 'Textblock (Om registret)' content_html was overwritten to 'Hello bold world' and its visibility toggled to visible. If the previous copy needs to be restored, main agent should re-seed. No new persistent sections were created (added cta_banner was deleted at end).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All discount-bubble + StyleEditor + RichTextEditor flows verified working via Playwright against the public URL. If admin wants to restore original hero copy (default discount was 20% RABATT / Kod: FAGEL20 / top-right) or original text_block content ('Skydd genom gemenskap' title with legacy content), do that manually in admin.

detailed_results.hidden_when_disabled: PASS - bubble absent when discount.enabled toggled off; reappears after re-enable
detailed_results.save_updates_bubble_on_public: PASS - saved 40% RABATT / Kod: TEST40 / /registrera-fagel and bubble rendered on public /
detailed_results.position_top_left: PASS - after saving position='top-left', bubble class contains top-4 left-4 on public
detailed_results.hero_styleeditor_present: PASS - hero-style-font, hero-style-title-color, hero-style-text-color, hero-style-align-left/center/right all found
detailed_results.hero_title_color_persists: PASS - selecting #B91C1C preset persists; public h1 inline style becomes 'color: rgb(185, 28, 28)' (visible red heading in screenshot)
detailed_results.bold_wrap_and_public_render: PASS - execCommand('bold') wrapped 'Hello bold world' in ; saved to config.content_html; public renders Hello bold world inside .rte-content
detailed_results.cta_banner_styleeditor_present: PASS - cta-style-font/title-color/text-color/align-left/center/right all found on newly-created cta_banner
detailed_results.persistence_after_logout: PASS - after logout, public / still shows 40% RABATT bubble at top-left and red hero H1

rca_of_issues: No user-facing issues. During testing I hit two automation-only quirks: (a) urllib to /api/homepage returned 403 (Cloudflare bot block on Python UA — unrelated to app); (b) initial attempt to set the color via the sibling text Input required using the native HTMLInputElement value setter because shadcn Input is a controlled React component — this is standard behavior, not a bug. Workaround: clicking the built-in #B91C1C preset color button worked cleanly.
